title: New Feature Request - Automation on a mirrored People Column
excerpt: I would like to request a new feature for something that seems like a bug or missed requirement.  I would like to be able to create a new automation to a person in a mirror people column.  By doing this it would allow us…

posts.author: HarveyHeise (Harvey Heise)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to request a new feature for something that seems like a bug or missed requirement. I would like to be able to create a new automation to a person in a mirror people column. By doing this it would allow us to better monitor and use our current users over multiple boards by mirroring and connecting the people from a central board out to multiple areas instead of having to maintain that piece in multiple boards.

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @HarveyHeise

I know one of our partners has an app that syncs mirror column (including people) to real columns. Probably @Kimb can help you with more info.

posts.author: Kimb (Kim Berney)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @HarveyHeise feel free to email me at kim@workperfect.io we have a great app that can help with this as described by @basdebruin

posts.author: kathonmonday (kathonmonday)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @kimb I’m new to this forum so apologies if I’m not asking correctly

I’m trying to assign a people column based on the same person in a mirrored people column and hitting major dead ends. It looks like you have a solution?

posts.author: Kimb (Kim Berney)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @kathonmonday thank you for the note. It sounds like our app can definitely solve your problem. Please email me at kim@workperfect.io and I’ll send through more details : )

posts.author: Bernard117 (Bernard van der Kuil)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there! I also need this feature. What’s the apps name and what’s the cost? I’m hesitant to pay for a feature I believe should’ve part of the base software?

posts.author: WirkKarl (Karl)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi! Totally get where you’re coming from it does feel like something that should be built in. The app is called and the pricing depends on the plan you choose, but it’s usually a small monthly fee. If you’re unsure, a lot of people start with the free trial to test it out before committing. That way you can see if it’s worth it for your workflow.
